summary.intent: Modernize the Moltis website to reflect new features by adding provider/LLM pills (inspired by Polyphony), improving positioning/messaging, and propagating all changes to 9 locale files.
summary.outcome: Added a 'Works with your stack' pills section with 4 categories and 29+ providers, extracted CSS to style.css, added positioning paragraph/how-it-works/use-cases/community quote sections, updated LoC stats, and translated all new content into 9 locales — committed and pushed as PR #567.

repo: The website uses a build-i18n.mjs script that generates locale files from index.en.html via string substitution pairs — new sections appear in English unless the script's string pairs are updated.
French (index.fr.html) was NOT in build-i18n.mjs and was maintained manually, so it was never regenerated automatically with other locales.
Locale files must be updated both by running the build script AND by directly editing the HTML when the build script's string pairs don't cover new content.
Raster icons (webp, png) cannot use CSS currentColor/invert the same way SVGs can — a separate pill-icon-color CSS class is needed to handle grayscale without inversion artifacts.
The website uses Tailwind CSS dark mode via a .dark class on the root element.
tokei reports: Rust codebase is ~215K lines of code, agent core (~11K LoC), total project ~377K lines across 1158 files.

code.finding: String substitution pairs must be updated whenever English source strings change, otherwise locale files keep old translations for those strings. French was absent from this file entirely.
Extracted from inline <style> in index.en.html. pill-icon and pill-icon-color are the two CSS classes for SVG vs raster pill icons respectively.

23 icon files: official SVGs from Simple Icons (openai, gemini, mistral, ollama, huggingface, openrouter, teams), brand websites (fireworks, deepseek, cerebras, zai, moonshot), custom SVGs, and raster logos (lmstudio.webp, minimax.png).

workflow: Simple Icons (simpleicons.org) is the canonical source for brand SVGs at small sizes.
When converting brand SVGs for dark mode, hardcoded fill colors should be replaced with currentColor — but raster logos cannot do this and need a separate CSS treatment.
MiniMax provided only a wordmark URL — the icon portion had to be cropped via ImageMagick.
Regenerating locale files from English source after changing hero strings leaves previously-translated strings in English because the build script's old string pairs no longer match.

friction: The build-i18n.mjs string pair approach breaks silently when English source strings change — locale files appeared correct but were actually serving English hero headings and category labels.
French was not in the build script at all, causing it to be missed in every regeneration pass until discovered late.
Multiple rounds of locale regeneration were needed (LoC stats, then full sections, then untranslated strings) because each issue was only discovered incrementally.
LM Studio has no public SVG logo — had to use a .webp app icon from their website.
MiniMax's provided URL was a wordmark with text, requiring cropping to isolate the icon.
Teams and DeepSeek icons were broken in first pass and required replacement SVGs.
Cerebras icon was broken and required a second replacement.
open_items: The build-i18n.mjs string pairs are still out of sync with the new English hero/subtitle strings — future regenerations may overwrite manual translation fixes.
French was added to build-i18n.mjs but the approach for managing translations was questioned; the final state uses direct HTML edits per locale rather than the build script for new sections.
MiniMax, Z.AI, and Venice pills have no widely-recognized icon (or custom SVG placeholders) and may benefit from official assets when available.
LM Studio pill uses a .webp raster icon — an official SVG would be preferable.
Social proof section has only one community quote (Noita) — more testimonials should be added.
New website sections (positioning, how-it-works, use-cases, community quote) exist only in English in the build script — proper i18n string pairs were never added to build-i18n.mjs for these.
Changes are only in index.en.html and locale files — other locale files will drift if build-i18n.mjs is used to regenerate without also updating string pairs for new content.
PR #567 was created but the i18n infrastructure debt was not fully resolved.
